code:
value Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

let cart = [
  Item(name: "apple", price: 120),
  Item(name: "bread", price: 300),
  Item(name: "cheese", price: 480),
]

mut subtotal = 0
for it in cart
  subtotal = subtotal + it.price
end

mut total = subtotal
if subtotal >= 500
  total = subtotal - 100
end

println("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
println("total=#{total}")
